title: Webhooks
subtitle: Deliver domain events to external systems over HTTP.
emptyDescription: Create a subscription to start receiving events.
rotateSecretWarning: The existing secret will be replaced immediately. Update your receiving endpoint before continuing.
rotateSecretRevealed: Copy the new secret now — it will not be shown again.
deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the subscription and all delivery history. Continue?
urlInvalid: URL must start with https:// or http://
created: Subscription created. Copy the secret now — it will not be shown again.
